3135890.name: Fighter: Thunder
3135890.description:
This is a delightful entertainment game!

You need to dodge the bullets shooting at you left and right, in order to survive for more time to pass the game

Every time a bullet is successfully dodged, the score in the upper left corner will increase, and surviving for as long as possible will earn higher scores

The entire game screen is rich and colorful, full of vitality, and the background music is vivid and dynamic, adding more fun to your gaming experience! Get ready to face challenges and become the fastest consumer entertainment player
3135890.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
